placeholders_needed: team/Team-CEO.jpg -- No dedicated CEO headshot available. Consider using gallery/REAL-PIC-FOUNDER-JUSTUS-MUHANGI-AFRICA-TOP-DISTRIBUTOR.jpeg from gallery
team/Team-Founder-International.jpg -- For Oi Ho Chooi. gallery/Oi-Ho-Chooi.jpg exists but is small (353x312). Consider gallery/Oi-Ho-Chooi-Quote.jpg (960x960) instead
team/Team-Esther-Ampumuza.jpg -- Top Africa distributor. gallery/ESTHER-AMPUMUZA.jpg available at 2222x2694
hero/Hero-Home-Primary.jpg -- Need a primary hero for homepage. Multiple candidates in hero/ directory
about/About-Mission-Statement.jpg -- Dedicated mission/vision photo not available, use CSS gradient or existing about/ photos
